_comment: FALLBACK / REFERENCE ONLY. The recommended install is the marketplace flow (see README); it auto-wires ALL hooks via hooks/hooks.json — the seven always-on hooks plus the UserPromptSubmit history reminder, which is wired but stays gated OFF until you set `history_reminder_enabled` true via settings.sh — so you do NOT need this file for them. Plugin path variables like CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT are substituted ONLY inside plugin-loaded hook configs (hooks/hooks.json) — they do NOT expand when pasted into ~/.claude/settings.json. So the placeholder /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/auto-task-plugin below must be replaced with the real absolute path to your clone (this is exactly what install.sh prints for you, so prefer copying install.sh's output). Merge into ~/.claude/settings.json — do NOT replace the file; preserve existing permissions, enabledPlugins, etc.

_optional_recommended_permissions._comment: OPTIONAL defence-in-depth, not required. The plugin does NOT impose permissions (denying git push globally would affect all your work). The Phase 5 push is already gated by the skill's single push prompt. If you want a mechanical backstop, merge the contents of `permissions` below into your settings.json `permissions` block (append to existing deny/ask arrays — do not replace them).
